offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/week, inconsistent inventory levels cause stockouts. We automate weekly inventory usage data alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent inventory levels leading to stockouts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try weekly inventory usage data report and alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
